stemHtml: Landing gear may not be fully extended. The crew wants a low pass for tower inspection. What is the correct message element order?

options.a: Pan pan (x3), station called, call sign, reason, intentions.
options.b: Pan pan (x3), call sign, station called, reason, intentions.
options.c: Mayday (x3), station called, call sign, reason, intentions.
options.d: Mayday (x3), station called, reason, intentions, call sign.
